violations.text: Food contact surfaces of ice machine was observed with an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was disposed and machine taken out of service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Establishment uses metal utensils for butter and popcorn with no way to wash, rinse, and sanitize. Establishment must use disposable utensils or install 3-bay sink. Metal utensils taken out of service. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The doors to the outside, located in the front lobby and a side door, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by what appears to be old rodent droppings in the theater (ladders stored along wall and stage ledge). Encon pest control service monthly. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The popcorn scoop is stored on an unclean surface (under machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Disposable utensils must be used. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Wood is used beneath the popcorn and butter machines, and beneath the ticket machine in the food and ticketing area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
Facility is lacking a 3-bay sink to wash, rinse, and sanitize utensils. Establishment must use disposable utensils or install 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
The shelves in the ticketing area is in poor repair (laminate surface chipped and missing pieces). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025

Unnecessary items and clutter were observed in the upstairs storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/12/2025
